title: docmend manifest header (adr-0019)
description: Line 1 of every manifest 2.0 NDJSON file: the header envelope anchoring run identity, source root, plan binding, backup-store root, and attempt lineage (safety-core design, Manifest 2.0 Wire Model). Every subsequent line is a docmend/manifest-record. The subchain link (prior_manifest_sha256) is null only on a chain's root manifest; prior_attempt is the discriminated attempt-lineage edge persisted redundantly here and in the run's report so it survives whichever artifact an interruption erases. backup_root is THIS run's resolved tool-backup root — null when the run took no tool backups (restore runs always carry null).

kind.description: 'apply' covers the first apply and every resume; 'restore' is an inverse-replay run.

source_root.description: Absolute resolved corpus root; every record path must resolve inside it.

backup_root.description: This run's resolved tool-backup root (the BackupStore trust anchor), or null when the run took no tool backups.

prior_manifest_sha256.description: sha256 of the newest earlier manifest in the attempt lineage; null only on the chain's root manifest.

prior_attempt.description: Attempt-lineage edge: the predecessor run plus exactly one of its report sha256 or closed-manifest sha256; null for a true first attempt.

effective_excludes.description: The effective exclude patterns that governed the apply lineage and license restore artifact destinations.
